name: Quick Biscuit Shortcakes
recipeIngredient: 1 package Refrigerator biscuits (Buy the very large ones)
1 package Frozen raspberries in syrup (Pureed and strained)
recipeInstructions:
Apple shortcakes:
1. Split each large biscuit in half.
2. Place one half on a dessert plate and top with apple pie filling.
3. Spread a layer of whipped topping over the apples.
4. Cover with the biscuit top, add a dollop of whipped topping, and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
Chocolate cookie shortcakes:
1. Pat each piece of dough flat on a baking sheet and bake until puffed and cooked. Let cool on a wire rack.
2. Cut each circle in half to create half circles.
3. Place one half circle on a plate. Top with banana slices and raspberry puree.
4. Dollop whipped topping over all, add another half circle, and finish with an additional dollop of topping.
5. Drizzle with more puree and serve immediately.
